items.title: C2PA - Announcements
items.content_text: The latest news and announcements from C2PA.

items.title: Event Recap | Verified Video: Authenticity from Capture to Playback
items.content_text: We hosted a conversation on how Content Credentials are making end-to-end provenance for video workflows a reality.

items.title: Gathering the ecosystem: Reflections from New York Tech Week
items.content_text: We brought about 100 members of the CAI community together for Tech Week in New York. Check out the highlights.

items.title: Reflecting on the Singapore Content Authenticity Summit 2026
items.content_text: Nearly 200 policymakers, technologists, media leaders, and platform representatives gathered in Singapore to learn about the C2PA standard. Here are the highlights.

items.title: Your work, your proof: Safe Creative and the future of copyright registration
items.content_text: Learn about how Safe Creative protects creators against content theft, and how they are implementing Content Credentials for transparency in IP registration.

items.title: How Forensic Photonics verifies digital evidence with Content Credentials
items.content_text: In high-stakes court proceedings, digital evidence has to be trustworthy. Learn how Forensic Photonics' LIFT device adds C2PA metadata to fingerprint images.

items.title: The three pillars of provenance that make up durable Content Credentials
items.content_text: The triad of technologies that make for permanent Content Credentials and that has the potential to unlock value in the creative economy.

items.title: The State of Content Authenticity in 2026
items.content_text: As the Content Authenticity Initiative marks five years and 6,000 members, interoperable content provenance is becoming real. With open standards, Content Credentials are now used across devices, media, and AI. 2026 will be a defining year for helping people understand what media is and how it’s made.

items.title: Event Recap | Proof of Personhood: Provenance and AI Avatars
items.content_text: We recently hosted a conversation on the opportunities and challenges of AI avatars. Check out the highlights.

items.title: Building trust for the future: a photojournalist’s workflow
items.content_text: David Butow explains why Content Credentials matter to him as a photojournalist and how he includes them in his workflow, from capture to edit to publish.

items.title: Introducing Content Credentials Foundations: a course for implementers
items.content_text: We're launching an educational video series in partnership with Pixelstream to expedite implementations of the C2PA standard.
